title: stelis angelica
intro: Stelis angelica, also known as Angel's Trumpet, is a flowering plant species in the family Orchidaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its alkaloid content, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and acting as an antispasmodic. Stelis angelica is often prepared as a tincture or tea and can also be used in traditional medicine to aid in pain relief and improve sleep quality.
